tagline: Your local guide to "the Gundo" — what's on the market, where to eat, where to play, and why this little beach town is one of the South Bay's best places to live.

welcome.body: I put this together so you can take a piece of El Segundo home with you. Inside you'll find the featured home, comparable listings, recent sales, and my honest local picks for food, coffee, parks, and more. Questions on anything? My info's at the bottom — reach out anytime.

market.note: A beach-adjacent city of ~17,000 with its own school district, a walkable Main Street, and quick access to LAX, the 405, and the sand. Figures reflect spring 2026 activity and are for general guidance.

mapIntro: The whole appeal of El Segundo is how compact it is — the open house, the beach, downtown, the Rec Park, and the best eats are all within a few minutes of each other.
mapNote: 📍 Scan the interactive map I shared, or ask me for the link to the live version.

dining.name: Porterhouse
dining.desc: Intimate, beautifully designed steakhouse with standout cocktails.

dining.name: Good Stuff
dining.desc: The go-to breakfast & brunch diner — easy parking, big portions.

dining.name: Jame Enoteca
dining.desc: Fresh handmade pasta in a cozy modern-Italian room.

dining.name: Sausal
dining.desc: Wood-fired "Nuevo Rancho" Mexican with a great happy hour.

dining.name: Nomad Eatery
dining.desc: Mediterranean-French plates, patio seating, strong wine list.

breweries.name: El Segundo Brewing
breweries.detail: 140 Main St · the OG, food trucks

parks.name: El Segundo Beach
parks.detail: Quiet local beach + Strand bike path

parks.name: Hilltop Park
parks.detail: Neighborhood park with a kiddie pool

schoolsLead: El Segundo Unified is a major draw for families — small, well-regarded, and entirely within the city.
